message:
test(search-core): add 21 tests for incremental updater

Expand updater.rs from 10 to 31 tests covering:
- Time-based flush trigger: zero-interval immediate expiry
- Edge configs: batch_size=1 immediate trigger, backpressure_threshold=1
- Multiple backpressure drops accumulate correctly
- Dedup edge cases: empty input, all-same-key stress (5→1),
  single change passthrough, same-id-different-kind kept distinct,
  upsert→delete→upsert last-write-wins ordering preservation
- Backend error propagation: FailingLifecycle mock, flush drains
  queue but does not increment applied/flush stats on error
- Default traits: IncrementalUpdater::default(), UpdaterStats::default()
- Flush resets should_flush timer (empty queue after flush)
- Enqueue after drain, project upsert convenience method
- Mixed operations (upsert + delete interleaved)
- Config/Stats Clone derive verification
- Flush duration recording
- Backpressure recovery after drain (dropped count persists)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
